channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Vance, US negotiators meeting with Iran, Pakistan delegations for ceasefire talks - Fox News
item.description:
1. Vance, US negotiators meeting with Iran, Pakistan delegations for ceasefire talks  Fox News

  3. Report says Pakistan talks at stalemate over Strait of Hormuz, which Iran claims US isn't actually clearing  The Times of Israel
  4. Iran War Live Updates: U.S. and Iran Hold Historic High-Level Peace Talks in Pakistan  The New York Times
  5. Direct talks taking place in Islamabad as U.S. and Iran seek path to end war  The Washington Post
